hero.headline: Your Trusted Partner for Buying Property and Investing in Turkey
hero.subheadline: We help you own property in Turkey with complete legal security.
hero.description: Whether your goal is living, investment, or obtaining Turkish citizenship, Mawtney provides professional consultation and carefully selected real estate opportunities in the best areas of Turkey.

badges.installments: Flexible Installment Plans up to 48 Months

why_choose_us.title: Why Choose Mawtney Real Estate?
why_choose_us.description: We provide comprehensive real estate solutions that help investors and clients make safe and well-informed decisions in the Turkish property market.

cards.title: Complete Legal Security
cards.description: We review all legal property documents including the title deed and official property valuation to ensure a safe investment.

cards.title: Professional Investment Analysis
cards.description: We help you choose areas with real growth potential and strong investment returns.

cards.title: Flexible Payment Plans
cards.description: We offer projects with multiple payment options including cash payments or convenient installment plans.

cards.title: After-Sales Support
cards.description: Our services continue after purchase with property rental, management, and resale support.
